summary: The UNLV Women's Counci l is excited to launch a book club this summer for faculty and staff that showcases books written by women about women. For more information and to sign up to participate, complete this brief form by Friday, May 15.

name: David Fott's Retirement Party May 13
summary: After many wonderful years in the Political Science Department, it’s time to celebrate a well-earned retirement. Please mark your calendar for Wednesday May 13, 2026, 1:30 p.m. - 3:30 p.m. in the Student Union Room 208 as we gather to honor Dr. Fott and this special milestone.

name: Campus Rec Hosting Sound Bath & Soul Movement May 5
summary: Join Campus Rec on Tuesday, May 5 for a session that harnesses the power of sound healing, mindful movements, and intentional breathing to harmonize the mind, body, and soul. This event will be on the SRWC Lawn from 5 p.m. to 6 p.m. and is free for faculty and staff.
